'''zathadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uji|uji]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uji|uji]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zathadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæthædhæth|zæthædhæth]] || [[word:zæthædhæj|zæthædhæj]] || [[word:zæthædhæsh|zæthædhæsh]] || [[word:zæthædhæ|zæthædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zathathadhath|zathathadhath]] || [[word:zathathadhaj|zathathadhaj]] || [[word:zathathadhash|zathathadhash]] || [[word:zathathadha|zathathadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zathadhath|zathadhath]] || [[word:zathadhaj|zathadhaj]] || [[word:zathadhash|zathadhash]] || [[word:zathadha|zathadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zathafdhath|zathafdhath]] || [[word:zathafdhaj|zathafdhaj]] || [[word:zathafdhash|zathafdhash]] || [[word:zathafdhaf|zathafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zathadhatha|zathadhatha]] || [[word:zathadhaja|zathadhaja]] || [[word:zathadhasha|zathadhasha]] || [[word:zathadhaka|zathadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zathadhath|zathadhath]] || [[word:zathadhaj|zathadhaj]] || [[word:zathadhash|zathadhash]] || [[word:zathadha|zathadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zathadhathal|zathadhathal]] || [[word:zathadhajal|zathadhajal]] || [[word:zathadhashal|zathadhashal]] || [[word:zathadhakal|zathadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zathadhathatha|zathadhathatha]] || [[word:zathadhajaja|zathadhajaja]] || [[word:zathadhashasha|zathadhashasha]] || [[word:zathadhaka|zathadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zathadhathan|zathadhathan]] || [[word:zathadhajan|zathadhajan]] || [[word:zathadhashan|zathadhashan]] || [[word:zathadhakan|zathadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zathadhathaoro|zathadhathaoro]] || [[word:zathadhajaoro|zathadhajaoro]] || [[word:zathadhashaoro|zathadhashaoro]] || [[word:zathadhakaoro|zathadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
